Why decisions feel hard

Deciding under pressure

The shift

Better decisions become possible when you shift from pressure to process.

Better Decisions Come From Better Criteria
04 / QUOTE
SCLA · Lesson System
5
Paths to list — not just one
The move
If you only compare one job to one other job, your frame is too narrow. List three to five possible paths before you decide.
05 / STAT
The Society for Collegiate Leadership & Achievement
Use your criteria to compare real paths — not just the loudest option.
